title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Institute of Fashion Technology Act, 2006. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act.
footnote: 1 1st April, 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 2159(E), dated 27th December, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
